title: Vibrant Dense Norwegian Oats Casserole
description: A cultured, dense brunch casserole that marries oats, apple juice, and anti‑inflammatory ingredients for a warm, satisfying start to the day.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 180 C and grease a medium baking dish.
In a bowl mix the oats, flaxseed, cranberries, walnuts, salt, and cinnamon.
Whisk the almond milk, apple juice, honey, and lemon zest in a separate bowl until fully combined.
Pour the liquid mixture over the dry ingredients and stir until everything is evenly moistened.
Transfer the mixture to the prepared baking dish and spread it out evenly.
Bake for 30 minutes until the top is golden and the oats are set.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before slicing to set the flavors.
Serve warm with a drizzle of extra honey if desired.
